raw_data.details: The Buti Foundation Award, established in 2007 by the Buti Foundation, New Delhi, is a biennial award recognizing innovative and outstanding research in the field of Plasma Science & Technology. The award aims to honor a Scientist/Engineer under the age of 45 years for their significant contributions to this field. The award includes a medal and a cash prize.
raw_data.eligibility: The applicant should be a Scientist/Engineer. The applicant’s age should be under 45 years as of 1st January 2021 (born on or after 02. 01. 1976). The applicant should have conducted innovative and outstanding research in the field of Plasma Science & Technology in India.
raw_data.application_process:
Online
Step 1: Download the prescribed format of the [application form](https://www.prl.res.in/prl-eng/sites/default/files/documents/national-awards/Proforma-for-Nomination-Buti-Foundation-Award-2019.doc) from the PRL official website.
Step 2: Fill in all the mandatory fields in the application form and attach copies of all the required documents (self-attested, if necessary).
Step 3: Candidate can email their applications in the prescribed format to: DIRECTOR@PRL. RES. IN with the subject line “Nomination for The Buti Foundation Award”.
raw_data.documents_required: Detailed Contribution Statement (2 pages). Impact Statement. List of Publications. List of TEN BEST Publications. Reprints of Five Important Publications (e-files only).

To know more please visit Check EligibilityButi Foundation AwardMinistry Of Science And TechnologyButi Foundation AwardAwardEngineerResearchScientistCheck EligibilityDetailsThe Buti Foundation Award, established in 2007 by the Buti Foundation, New Delhi, is a biennial award recognizing innovative and outstanding research in the field of Plasma Science & Technology. The award aims to honor a Scientist/Engineer under the age of 45 years for their significant contributions to this field. The award includes a medal and a cash prize. BenefitsAward Amount: ₹50,000Award Recognition: MedalEligibilityThe applicant should be a Scientist/Engineer. The applicant’s age should be under 45 years as of 1st January 2021 (born on or after 02. 01. 1976). The applicant should have conducted innovative and outstanding research in the field of Plasma Science & Technology in India. Application ProcessOnlineStep 1: Download the prescribed format of the [application form](https://www.prl.res.in/prl-eng/sites/default/files/documents/national-awards/Proforma-for-Nomination-Buti-Foundation-Award-2019.doc) from the PRL official website. Step 2: Fill in all the mandatory fields in the application form and attach copies of all the required documents (self-attested, if necessary). Step 3: Candidate can email their applications in the prescribed format to: DIRECTOR@PRL. RES. IN with the subject line “Nomination for The Buti Foundation Award”. Documents RequiredDetailed Contribution Statement (2 pages). Impact Statement. List of Publications. List of TEN BEST Publications. Reprints of Five Important Publications (e-files only). Frequently Asked Questions What is the age limit for the award? Nominees must be under 45 years of age as of January 1, 2021 (born on or after January 2, 1976). What is the prize amount? The award includes a medal and a cash prize of ₹50,000. What should be included in the nomination? Significant contributions, the impact of contributions, specific contributions, a complete list of publications, TEN BEST publications, and reprints of five important publications.

Can I submit physical copies of the documents? No, only e-files of the reprints are accepted. All submissions should be via email.

Can past nominees be re-nominated? Yes, but a fresh nomination must be submitted according to the current criteria and guidelines.

Who can make a nomination? Nominations can be made by Heads of Academic & Research Institutions, Vice-Chancellors, Deans of Universities, Fellows of Indian Academies of Science and Engineering, and past recipients of the award.

What should be the subject line of the nomination email? The subject line should be 'Nomination for The Buti Foundation Award'.

How is the impact of contributions evaluated? The impact is evaluated based on the significance of the nominee’s contributions to the Plasma Science & Technology field.

Where can I download the nomination proforma? The proforma can be downloaded from the PRL website under National Awards --> Buti Foundation Award.

How should the nomination be submitted? Nominations should be emailed to the Director, PRL at DIRECTOR@PRL. RES. IN with the required document.

Sources And References[Guidelines](https://www.prl.res.in/prl-eng/opportunities/aabprl/butifoundationaward)
